no: Assigning kits to NPCs is a matter of taste. Be sure to give them each a try in their vanilla build before assigning anything for sure
sum: Assigns custom kits from the Artisan's Kitpack to existing NPCs like Khalid, Minsc, and others, with options for different kit assignments.

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Khalid the Vanguard Kit
co.no: Assigns Vanguard fighter kit to Khalid. Defensive warrior with shield specialization.
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Khalid the Vanguard Kit

co.n: Arcane Archer
co.no: Assigns Arcane Archer kit to Emily (Skitia NPC, BG1).
co.scn: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Skitia's Emily an

co.n: Arcane Archer / Mage
co.scn: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Skitia's Emily an

co.n: Arcane Archer
co.no: Assigns Arcane Archer kit to Emily (Skitia NPC, BG2).
co.scn: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Skitia's Emily an

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Rashemi Berserker Ranger Kit for Minsc
co.no: Assigns Rashemi Berserker ranger kit to Minsc. Rage-based wilderness warrior from Rashemen.
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Rashemi Berserker Ranger Kit for Minsc

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Ajantis the Divine Champion Kit
co.no: Assigns Divine Champion paladin kit to Ajantis. Holy warrior with enhanced smite and auras.
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Ajantis the Divine Champion Kit

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Mazzy a Divine Champion
co.no: Assigns Divine Champion paladin kit to Mazzy. Makes her a proper paladin.
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Mazzy a Divine Champion

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Cernd the Elementalist Kit
co.no: Assigns Elementalist druid kit to Cernd. Nature caster focused on elemental magic.
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Cernd the Elementalist Kit

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Red Wizard Mage Kit for Edwin
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Red Wizard Mage Kit for Edwin
co.no: Assigns Red Wizard mage kit to Edwin. Thayan specialist with enhanced evocation.

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Imoen the Rogue Archer Kit
co.no: Assigns Rogue Archer thief kit to Imoen. Ranged combat specialist.
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Imoen a Rogue Archer

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Imoen the Trickster Kit
co.no: may be of interest if you want to empower a pure class Imoen during BG1
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Imoen a Trickster

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Hexxat the Invisible Blade Kit
co.no: It automatically uses the first mimic skill on spellcasting. Fits Imoen particularly well. If you plan to dual class her as normal and/or are using a releveling mod, you may want to hold on dual class
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Hexxat the Invisible Blade Kit

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Jan the Arcane Trickster Kit
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give Jan the Arcane Trickster Kit

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give M'khiin the Warhorn Shaman Kit
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Give M'khiin the Warhorn Shaman Kit

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Rasaad a Sacred Fist
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Rasaad a Sacred Fist

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Xan an Eldritch Knight
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Xan an Eldritch Knight

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Nalia an Arcane Trickster (Sorcerer)
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Nalia an Arcane Trickster (Sorcerer)

co.n: Arcane Archer / Mage
Artisan's Kitpack: Red Wizard Mage Kit for Edwin
co.no: v18 moved to cn:8 (was cn:5102 in older version)

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Make Montaron an Assassin
co.no: Assigns Assassin thief kit to Montaron.
